steps.title: Separate first and later days
steps.content: The first day costs $72$ dollars. Each additional day costs $36$ dollars, so for $d$ total days, there are $d-1$ additional days.

steps.title: Simplify the cost function
steps.content:
Write and simplify the total cost:
$$C(d)=72+36(d-1)=72+36d-36=36d+36$$The answer is A.
